productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men loma Tan Casual Shoes
description: When you have the desire to hang out in style wear these casual Loma slip-ons from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most stylish person at the gathering! Since they have no laces, you can get into and out of them with utmost ease. Made of genuine leather, they are not just great-looking, but are also lightweight and comfortable. Pair them with your best pair of jeans and a smart tee to look like a fashionista. Upper Full grain leather upper for added durability and style Contrast stitch detailing for added structure and style Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug Fit Hidden elastic gores on either side for a more versatile fit Stud detailing for added attraction Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel for better support Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured elevated ridges on the outsole for better traction on all surfaces Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
